services.title: Visual Assessments
services.body: Evaluating home environments for visibility and safety.

services.title: Home Modifications
services.body: Installing grab bars, ramps, and other accessibility features.

services.title: Strength & Mobility Exercises
services.body: Tailored exercises to improve daily living skills.

services.title: Fall Prevention Strategies
services.body: Reducing risks and enhancing home safety for older adults.

services.title: Temperature Management
services.body: Assessing and adjusting heating systems for comfort.

services.title: Access Solutions
services.body: Simplifying door locks, handles, and other entry points.

faqs.a: Yes, all our occupational therapists are fully HCPC registered.

faqs.q: Do you offer home assessments for dementia patients?
faqs.a: Absolutely. We specialize in creating safe and supportive environments for individuals with dementia.

faqs.q: How long does a typical assessment take?
faqs.a: Assessments usually last between 1 to 2 hours, depending on the individual's needs.

faqs.q: Can you help with home modifications?
faqs.a: Yes, we can recommend and assist in implementing necessary home modifications for safety and comfort.
